description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Concerns provisions for a man: "...something to cover himself with and enter... and if God decrees his death... the bearers (of the coffin) and everything else necessary...." Cf. T-S 8.122 (which is not clearly a join). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
